system.description:
These devices can be issued with weapons that use needle rounds, and are often built directly into the holster or carrying case for the weapon. A precipitator crystallises liquid or powdered chemicals into the rounds fired by needle weapons. One dose of a drug or toxin yields one shot of ammunition. See Drugs and Consumables on page 172 for toxin options. Unless otherwise stated, any toxin may be precipitated into needle rounds.

Used With: Needle rifles.
